for incorporating apparatus operated by power, including water power; for incorporating apparatus for cooking, cooling, or laundry purposes

by incorporation of racks or supports, other than shelves, for household utensils

operated by mechanically-stored energy, e.g. by springs

self-closing
having both self-opening and self-closing mechanisms which interact with each other
